description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Code Scan: JPL Coding Standard that runs on push to devel and release branches and on pull requests to those branches, excluding certain paths. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job with read permissions for actions and contents and write permission for security events. Run a matrix strategy with a cpp language job for multiple config files, checking out the repository, initializing CodeQL tools, building the project with a venv and pip, and performing CodeQL analysis.
